JOUR370

Photojournalism

JOUR371

Feature Writing

Journalism Capstone Experience

Upper-Level Courses of Choice. A minimum of 9 credits must be upper-level JOUR courses, at least 6 of which must be upper-level skills courses in the 321-389 range.

1 Should a student choose to combine the options, at least one language

course must be at the intermediate level

2 Up to two courses with at least one course at the intermediate level and no more than one course at the introductory level. (High school equivalency does not satisfy this requirement.)
